---
title: "IFCD044 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


<style>
tr:nth-child(0) {
  background-color: #b2b2b2!important;
  color: #f4f4f4!important;
}
</style>


![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

## ``Sprint#3: Approaches Multi-Agent App II`` (July 2026)

::: {.column-page-right}
| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #3 | 09 |  13/07/2026 |  - Plan Spring#3: </br></br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App II </br> - Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br> - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works </br> - Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything | - [Week#03](/scrum/scrum-week3.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br>- [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br>- [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank' } </br> |
|  | 10 | 14/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 11 | 15/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 12 | 16/07/2026 |   |     |
|  | 13 | 17/07/2026 |   |     |
: Sprint #3  Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Legend"}
- `-` > topic planned and **done**
- `- ` <s>done</s> > topic not done in class (**pending**)
- `++` > not-planned new topic
:::
